title: A brown rat
name: A brown rat

name: A crypt broodmother

title: An escaped minion
name: An escaped minion
location: It spawns within a room near the main entrance of the dungeon that contains several upright and open tombs which are embedded in the walls. A good way to know if you are near the right room is to look for a cracked wall with a hole in it. This wall is just outside the room in which the quest NPC can be found in.

title: An old scarab
name: An old scarab
location: In the canyons above the Necropolis. Standing beside the tilted obelisk.

title: An ornate beetle
name: An ornate beetle
location: In the canyons above the Necropolis. Up the ramp from the obelisk.

title: Ariblast the Wicked
name: Ariblast the Wicked
location: Deep in the section of the tomb found following the right path from the fork room. The fork room has blue torches and contains a large plaque engraved with a dragon.

title: Assistant Researcher Farland
name: Assistant Researcher Farland
location: This NPC is found outside Night Harbor. To find him exit the West Gate and go Right until you get to the mountain, he is in a tent, there are torches.

title: Ayip
name: Ayip
location: From Shaded Dunes entrance follow the path that splits left before the main gate. Towards the back of the shallow cave area Ayip spawned at the very back left with 2 potential adds. '''[Durin, Krivea Test]'''

name: Baewyn Mossfang

name: Bishop Aybram
location: Inside the Undead Keep area. On the main tower hill there is a door at the top of a ramp on the southern side of the hill. His room is in that door to the right as you enter.

title: Bone Construct
name: Bone Construct
location: Large room at the end of the northern hallway found just before the chapel where [[Timmon Bell]] resides.
special: [[Bone Smash]], [[Deathtouch]], Aura:[[Presence of the Bone Construct]]
categories: Tomb of the Last Wyrmsbane NPCs

title: Bones
name: Bones
location: He is inside the Necropolis, in the same room as [[Sekhmet]] who gives the initial [[Necromancer Starter Quest (Night Harbor)]] quest. The room is through the middle path when you enter from the courtyard.

name: Brahson the Butcher

title: Exavius Deathwhisper
name: Exavius Deathwhisper
location: Exavius is on the third floor of the Concourse of Souls, in a green room by himself over-looking the front yard. When entering the Concourse of Souls through the front doors, take a left in the main room, and then a left at the end of the hall. Follow that hall to the very top of the stairs and he will be in a small room on your right (just before the hallway begins sloping down again).

title: Fariha bint Nizar
name: Fariha bint Nizar
location: Spawns as part of the quest line, completed in Grain Cellar.

name: Kilia

name: Krothun Veincarver

name: Lanna Ivintoria
location: Inside the Grand Library, in the center on the lower-middle floor.

name: Librarian Gallier

special: [[Cold Protection]], [[Life Sap]], [[Poisonous Deluge]], Immunities: Charm, Snare, and Root

title: Lieutenant Gregan Snyde
name: Lieutenant Gregan Snyde
location: Section of the tomb found following the right path from the fork room. The fork room has blue torches and contains a large plaque engraved with a dragon. His room is a large hallway containing many skeletal marksman.
known_loot: Great Sword of the Dragon Crusader
categories: Tomb of the Last Wyrmsbane NPCs

title: Lieutenant Jarovik Holt
name: Lieutenant Jarovik Holt
location: In the gatehouse entrance to the Bends in Night Harbor.
related_quests: Platinum Badge of the Living City Quest

title: Little Tamsah
name: Little Tamsah
location: Little Tamsah is located inside the Seekers of the Lost Eye in Saltbreeze Park.

title: Liyna Esueiruc
name: Liyna Esueiruc
location: Inside the Grand Library, bottom floors (mezzanine, west end; same floor as [[Lanna Ivintoria]]).

title: Lumberjacking Supplies Evershade
name: Lumberjacking Supplies Evershade
location: Located East of the Kennel Lift, go til you see [[Scout Amberward]] and drop down.

title: Lumberjacking Trainer Evershade
name: Lumberjacking Trainer Evershade
location: Located East of the Kennel Lift, go til you see [[Scout Amberward]] and drop down.

title: Maleq
name: Maleq
location: Wanders the around plateau with the entrance to the [[Infested Crypt]] and down the coast to the crocs and caimans.

title: Malik the Glass Viper
name: Malik the Glass Viper

title: Malory Moreland
name: Malory Moreland
location: Found on the second floor of the Concourse of Souls

title: Masonry Supplier Arthis
name: Masonry Supplier Arthis
location: Inside the temple against the cliff between Sojourner's Camp and the Tannery. Follow the road north until you reach the temple.

title: Masoumeh Akhtar
name: Masoumeh Akhtar
location: Masoumeh is in the main room of the Seekers of the Lost Eye, next to Errol.

title: Master Khaila
name: Master Khaila
location: North of the Twilight Harbor area. '''Directions:''' Go to Saltbreeze Park and out the south exit towards the harbor. Find and face the Monk Trainer. Go right and through the arch (to a pair of ''a Fourfold adept''). Go left (don't drop down, but along the sand) and past the stairwell to your right. Go up the stairs in the building in front of you (Disenchanter Qaridi is on the roof).

title: Master Tracker Lark
name: Master Tracker Lark
location: Ground level broken tower in the undead section of the flats, His placeholder is a charred tracker

title: Matheus Griswald
name: Matheus Griswald
location: In the cave that leads to [[Tomb of the Last Wyrmsbane]] located not far from the entrance.

title: Mayana
name: Mayana
location: Mayana is located in Saltbreeze Park or near the School of the Fourfolds.

title: Meluli Dawnglow
name: Meluli Dawnglow
location: Found during the day among the pixies up the hill from black widow hatchlings.

title: Mercenary Captain Hulg
name: Mercenary Captain Hulg
location: Above the Quarry atop a watchtower.

name: Mercenary Foldja
location: In the very top of the cliffs by stairs, past the outpost, deep into the mountain.

title: Mercenary Lord Hrrush
name: Mercenary Lord Hrrush
location: Mercenary Fortress on the ridge towards [[Tel Ekir]].

title: Merrisam Copperhelm
name: Merrisam Copperhelm
location: Part of the night undead parade. Inside undead cave area, at base of cliff.

name: Mezzatrian Boneweaver
location: It has spawned on the bottom floor widow hatchling/widow area north of Faelindral, and also on the cliffside leading to the disconnected platform in North Faelindral. I think the Black Widows are the placeholder for the Boneweaver.

title: Mierra Willowshade
name: Mierra Willowshade
location: Located next to the Inn by the Newbie Lift.

name: Moon Dances

location: In the quarry on top of a spire near the foreman, He does walk with the other goblins from the quarry to Night Harbor.

location: Hang a left after leaving Night Harbor's north gate, he's next to a campfire.

location: Smuggler caves, just to the left inside in the first room coming from the beach.

title: Yapala
name: Yapala
location: From Shaded Dunes, head to Main gate entrance. There is a cave to the right behind a cart, follow the cave all the way up until you overlook the main gate. Now head all the way to last platform up top, Yapala spawns there as shown in picture above. Spawned 6 times for me, spear dropped once.'''[Durin, Krivea Test]'''

title: Yorias
name: Yorias
location: Yorias is located down the ramp, behind two trees near The Bends entrance, east of the Sageside Teleporter.

title: Zakariah Shriki
